source: Asaph Ibn Berechiah - Kitab Al-Ajnas (كتاب الأجناس)
description: The Book of Species — Solomonic grimoire by Asaph Ibn Berechiah, containing the seven planetary seals, terrestrial jinn kings, and divine names for evocation

seven_celestial_seals.description: First seal mentioned — greatest of the angels, governs the divine chariot
seven_celestial_seals.names: Names taught to Moses, by which Elijah was raised to heaven
seven_celestial_seals.position: Highest heaven, nearest to the divine presence

seven_celestial_seals.description: Stands at the left side of divine power, angel of revelation
seven_celestial_seals.role: Right-hand angel of the throne, governs divine communication
Guardian of souls, provider of nourishment

seven_celestial_seals.description: Angel of death, stands at divine power

seven_celestial_seals.role: Earthly ruler of jinn, governs terrestrial spirits
seven_celestial_seals.position: Under the heaven of the world, rules jinn and demons

seven_celestial_seals.role: Flying spirits in the air, governs revelation to mankind
Extraction of secrets from books of mysteries

seven_terrestrial_kings.note: Also called مرة الأبيض — the white, bitter one
Great king, swift answer, spirits under his command beyond counting
Swift answer, great obedience, flying spirits
ميمون أبا نوح — Father Noah, good answer, swift obedience

additional_kings.name: خندش (Khandash)
additional_kings.note: Earthly king with specific seal and judgment

additional_kings.name: أبا معبد زنبور (Abu Ma'bad Zanbur)
additional_kings.note: King with specific seal and helpers

additional_kings.name: مهاكي (Mihaki/Mahaquil)
additional_kings.Note: King with helpers صخر بن عمرو بن سرجيل

seal_construction_rules.gold_seals: For Sun, Jupiter — gold or red agate, Sunday or Thursday
seal_construction_rules.silver_seals: For Moon, Venus — pure white silver, Friday
seal_construction_rules.iron_seals: For Mars — steel iron, Saturday (for Mimun), Tuesday
seal_construction_rules.timing: First hour after sunrise on the planet's day, in its exaltation
seal_construction_rules.washing: Wash seal with running water and salt after engraving
seal_construction_rules.consecration: Raise (tanjim) the seal according to seal-raising ritual
seal_construction_rules.silk_pouch: Place consecrated seal in white silk pouch

divine_names.supreme: اسم الله الأعظم (The Greatest Name of God)
divine_names.creation_names: Names by which God created all the heavens
divine_names.moses_names: Names taught to Moses, by which he spoke to the Israelites
divine_names.elijah_names: Names by which Elijah was raised to heaven
divine_names.solomon_names: Names by which Solomon commanded jinn and wind
divine_names.oath_formula: بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم ألا تعلوا عليّ وأنتوني مسلمين

wind_of_solomon.description: Solomon's wind sail — by which he traveled between kingdoms
wind_of_solomon.names: Names of the wind sail that Solomon ibn Dawood used
wind_of_solomon.function: Travel between kingdoms, subjugation of all peoples
wind_of_solomon.basmala: بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم الحمد لله رب العالمين
